title: Auto-sync startup shows duplicate notification (toast not updated by id)
listbox isInteractiveElement uses !== undefined not !== null for tabindex
refuteReason: Unreachable: element reaching the check must already be focusable; a no-tabindex non-interactive element cannot be the keyboard event target. Latent dead-code defect, not user-visible.

title: book-chapter next teleports to first book when current book not in availableBooks
refuteReason: State book-not-in-availableBooks not reachable in normal flow; scrRef.book always chosen from availableBooks (self-reinforcing invariant). Existing test treats it as a non-asserted edge.

title: Bible/Commentaries tab dropdown blurred behind component (iframe z-index isolation)
Sync button not displayed for Observer or local<->S&R project switch
No notification on auto-shutdown sync
Sonner shown for manual sync status (fix lives in private extension)

evidenceRef: RED: notification.service-host.test.ts PT-4002 - 2nd toast.info call has no top-level id (action:undefined,duration:10000); expected id:toast-1

title: Dictionary buildDisplaySource emits stray "()" when transliteration is empty in both mode
refuteReason: Real latent inconsistency vs encyclopedia-presenter guard, but entry-level displaySource field is not consumed by any caller (web-view reads only senses + totalOccurrences); zero user impact today.

title: Arrow key at list boundary deselects entry and closes detail panel after a click (semantic-domain viewer)
refuteReason: Skeptic could not refute on any of 6 axes: wide mode is production default (768px dialog), click sets focusedIndex=-1 while selectedId stays set, boundary guard checks focusedIndex not startIdx so falls through to selectItem toggle-off. Contradicts documented intent (no reselect at boundaries).

title: EncyclopediaTab renders first article body under every stacked entry for multi-article lemmas
refuteReason: Skeptic confirmed: articleDataMap keyed by tokenId only, web-view fetches only entries[0], component passes same articleData to every EncyclopediaEntryDetail; reproducible in shipped Storybook fixture (shamayim, 3 refs). Residual uncertainty is real-world frequency of 2+ thematic-link tokens.

title: EncyclopediaTab renders first article body under every stacked entry for multi-article lemmas
Checks status bar: queued job renders no progress bar/Cancel button (JSX operator-precedence bug)
refuteReason: Code at line 324 is A || (B && C && JSX); queued state reachable on job start, renders boolean true (nothing)

title: combineJobStatus: single errored runner masks results from successful runners
refuteReason: Below trust bar; gated by rare multi-runner setups and uncertain UI behavior

title: Manage Books select-all selects disabled not-in-reference books, inflating count and triggering preflight
refuteReason: toggleAllInGroup iterates group.items without filtering item.disabled; full chain to footer count and missing-model preflight verified

title: Import book-ID filename fallback uses first substring match (38ZECCUNP89T -> ECC not ZEC)
refuteReason: allBooks.find(b=>upper.includes(b)) returns first canonical substring match; reached by every USX import and files lacking id marker

title: Book grid keyboard navigation dead for a collapsed group that becomes the sole filtered group
refuteReason: flatBooks uses raw isCollapsed while render force-expands single group; moveFocus early-returns on empty flatBooks

title: Find verse-context preview truncateText off-by-one (14 vs 15 words)
refuteReason: Cosmetic, symmetric on both sides, only fires on >15-word contexts; no-trim is deliberate to preserve highlight spacing

title: Find PageDown with nothing focused jumps to second page
refuteReason: Minor UX, below trust bar, uncertain user impact

title: Markers Checklist empty state always shows identical-markers message; No markers found is dead code
refuteReason: getLocalizedString returns key (non-nullish) so third ?? operand unreachable; reachable via Hide Matches emptying rows with undefined emptyResultMessage

title: Checks status bar: queued job renders no progress bar/Cancel button (JSX operator-precedence bug)
Manage Books select-all selects disabled not-in-reference books, inflating count and triggering preflight
Book grid keyboard navigation dead for a collapsed group that becomes the sole filtered group
Markers Checklist empty state always shows identical-markers message; No markers found is dead code

evidenceRef: extensions/src/platform-scripture/src/manage-books-dialog/manage-books-dialog.utils.test.ts (RED: 38ZECCUNP89T.SFM -> ECC expected ZEC; 40MATGEN.SFM -> GEN expected MAT)

title: Switch Scripture View cannot toggle back from Markers to Formatted in simple interface mode (decides next view from markerMode not viewType)
refuteReason: Independent skeptic could not refute on any of 7 axes: simple is default interfaceMode; markers reachable (1st toggle works); both formatted+markers resolve to markerMode hidden in simple mode so 2nd toggle re-sets markers; line 738 is the ONLY setViewType caller; viewType persisted via useWebViewState across reloads; menu item has no when-gating. Verified library values: getDefaultViewOptions and getViewOptions(paragraph-structure) both markerMode hidden.
